code_template: Identify and filter highly variable genes.
Memory-First: Accepts both file path (str) and AnnData object.
Parameter Safety: Uses default_params merged with agent_params.
Metadata Footprinting: Records execution to adata.uns['analysis_history'].
Path to AnnData file or AnnData object in memory
AnnData with highly variable genes flagged in var
adata = input_data if isinstance(input_data, ad.AnnData) else sc.read(input_data)

cognitive_layer.purpose: Highly variable genes (HVGs) show large differences in expression across cells and likely represent biologically meaningful variation. Filtering to HVGs reduces noise, focuses analysis on informative genes, and improves computational efficiency.

parameter_impact.n_top_genes: Number of top variable genes to select. More genes preserve more variation but include noise. 1500-3000 is typical for 10x data.
parameter_impact.flavor: seurat_v3 is recommended for UMI counts (accounts for mean-variance relationship). seurat is for non-UMI data.

error_handling.ValueError: n_top_genes must be positive: Ensure n_top_genes is a positive integer.
error_handling.ValueError: no variable genes found: Check if data is already filtered or contains very low variation.

post_processing_code: return {'metrics': {}, 'warnings': ['HVG selection not found in history'], 'success': False}
warnings.append(f'TOO FEW HVGs: Only {n_hvg} selected for {protocol} (expected >={t["min_hvg"]}). May lose signal.')
warnings.append(f'CRITICAL: Very few HVGs ({n_hvg}). Data may have low variability or质量问题.')
warnings.append(f'HIGH HVG FRACTION: {hvg_fraction*100:.1f}% of genes selected for {protocol} (expected <{t["max_hvg_fraction"]*100:.0f}%). May include noise.')
success = n_hvg >= t['min_hvg'] and hvg_fraction < t['max_hvg_fraction']

too_few_hvg.causal_chain: More genes capture more of the variable information in the data, reducing the risk of losing subtle but important population differences.
too_few_hvg.expected_effect: More genes retained, potentially more noise

too_many_hvg.causal_chain: Fewer genes focuses on the most variable genes, reducing noise and computational burden.
